roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LDPX: 11-22-21 (10TH)/X: THE 60TH LAST DAY IS 01-04-22/ACM/X:AS ACONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BYTHE SFSO/CTORD: HOME DETENTION/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTERA COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING & ADDRESS CORRECTION FOR CPOON #21007524/DOP/TE: 1 HOUR/
